Name: Lonquan Forged Steel
Description:
Longquan • Forged Weapons

Crafted in the City of Swords

A tradition shaped by fire, refined by generations, and chosen for one reason: enduring quality.

A brief history of Longquan

Longquan (Zhejiang Province, China) is renowned for its centuries-old bladesmithing culture, so much so that it’s often called the “City of Swords.” Generations of smiths developed techniques for forging, heat treatment, and polishing that helped define what people expect from a well-made blade: balance in the hand, clean geometry, and a reliable edge.

Today, modern workshops continue that heritage with upgraded steels and precision grinding—while still relying on the fundamentals that made Longquan famous: disciplined forging, controlled tempering, and careful finishing.

Why we source from Longquan

We chose Longquan suppliers because the region has deep specialisation - experienced smiths, proven heat-treat processes, and a culture of blade craftsmanship. That focus helps us deliver forged weapons that look right, feel right, and hold up to real use.

What matters to us
  • Forging discipline: consistent shaping, clean lines, and strong fundamentals.
  • Heat treatment focus: edge retention and resilience start in the temper.
  • Finish options: from working finishes to display-ready polish and fittings.
  • Value-to-quality: specialized craft without inflated boutique pricing.

Note: As with any forged item, small variations can occur from piece to piece. We prioritize structural integrity, fit, and finish, and we select suppliers that consistently meet our standards.

Name: Training Shirts
Description:
TOUGH COTTON KUNG FU TRAINING SHIRTS

Built for practitioners who treat training as a ritual. These heavy-duty cotton shirts stand up to stance work, conditioning drills, and the controlled chaos of sparring. Each colour represents a traditional skill tier, carrying the centre’s emblem of the dragon and phoenix in balanced motion.

Key Features

  • Heavy-grade cotton built to handle rugged training.
  • Soft feel while maintaining durability and structure.
  • High-resolution centre emblem: dragon & phoenix in balanced form.
  • Colour ranks aligned with your traditional progression.
  • Ideal for daily classes, seminars, and discipline-driven practice.

Sizing & Fit

True-cut fit with enough room for dynamic movement. Size up if you prefer a looser feel for weapon forms or intense conditioning sessions.

Name: Japanese Katana
Description:
Japanese Katana

The Japanese katana is defined by elegance, balance, and cutting precision. Originating from centuries of disciplined bladesmithing, the katana’s curved profile, hardened edge, and refined geometry make it one of the most recognizable swords in history.

Our Longquan-forged katana are crafted using traditional inspiration combined with modern steel and heat treatment, offering reliable performance, authentic aesthetics, and exceptional value for collectors and practitioners alike.

Name: Chinese Dao
Description:
Chinese Dao

The Chinese dao is a powerful, single-edged sword designed for decisive cuts and battlefield reliability. Often called the “general of weapons,” its forward-weighted blade and durable construction made it a mainstay of Chinese martial tradition for centuries.

Our Longquan-forged dao blend historical form with modern forging and heat treatment, delivering strong cutting performance, solid handling, and authentic styling suited for practice, display, or collection.

Name: Chinese Jian
Description:
Chinese Jian

The Chinese jian is a refined, double-edged straight sword prized for balance, precision, and control. Known as the “gentleman of weapons,” it has long been associated with scholars, officers, and martial artists who value finesse over brute force.

Our Longquan-forged jian follow traditional proportions while using modern steels and heat treatment to ensure durability, responsiveness, and clean lines—ideal for forms practice, collection, and elegant display.
